raw_transcript: Actually, we have two main paths. One is 'swallowed' steroids—you take a Budesonide slurry or an inhaler but swallow the medicine instead of breathing it in. It coats the esophagus. The other is the 'Six-Food Elimination Diet'—getting rid of milk, wheat, eggs, soy, nuts, and fish.
final_corrected_note: Actually, we have two main paths. One is 'swallowed' steroids—you take a Budesonide slurry or an inhaler but swallow the medicine instead of breathing it in. It coats the esophagus. The other is the 'Six-Food Elimination Diet'—getting rid of milk, wheat, eggs, soy, nuts, and fish.
